DEPT. 613 - C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE; PRESENT ARE JUDGE LILLIAN K. SING, CLERK JOSE RIOS-MERIDA, REPORTER CARLITO MANDIA-CSR	689, PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY MICHAEL E. MARQUEZ, AND DEFENDANT ATTORNEY ANDREW S. WERNER. COURT AND COUNSEL CONF ER IN CHAMBERS. CASE SETTLES WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF THE COURT. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL STATES THE TERMS IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT MAYFLOWER TRANSIT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INS. THE AMOUNT OF $2000. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. UPON SATISFACTION OF SETTLEMENT TERMS THE PLAINTIFF SHALL DISMISS THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. A HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL IS SET FOR SEPT- 17-2002 AT 10:00 A.M, IN DEPT 212, PER RULE 225, CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT. THE TRIAL DATE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE BY CLERK.
